zh.Barthomley, Nantwich, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾巴堂姆利
zh.Sible Hedingham, Essex, England: 英國艾可希布爾 丁加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas de Praers於1287年出生在英國艾可希布爾 丁加姆時，他的父親Richard de Praers33歲，母親Johanna Crewe11284歲。他於大約1334年與Mrs. Margery De Praers Of Barthomley在英國英格蘭艾可結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。他去世於1348年4月8日在英國艾可希布爾 丁加姆享年61歲，埋葬在英國艾可希布爾 丁加姆。

zh-hans.Barthomley, Nantwich, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾巴堂姆利
zh-hans.Sible Hedingham, Essex, England: 英国艾可希布爾 丁加姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas de Praers于1287年出生在英国艾可希布爾 丁加姆时，他的父亲Richard de Praers33岁，母亲Johanna Crewe11284岁。他于大约1334年与Mrs. Margery De Praers Of Barthomley在英国英格兰艾可结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。他去世于1348年4月8日在英国艾可希布爾 丁加姆享年61岁，埋葬在英国艾可希布爾 丁加姆。

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas de Praers was born in 1287, in Sible Hedingham, Essex, England, his father, Richard de Praers, was 33 and his mother, Johanna Crewe, was 11284. He married Mrs. Margery De Praers Of Barthomley about 1334, in Essex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. He died on 8 April 1348, in Sible Hedingham, Essex, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in Sible Hedingham, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas de Praers est né en 1287, à Sible Hedingham, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Praers, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Johanna Crewe, avait 11284 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Margery De Praers Of Barthomley environ 1334, à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Il est décédé le 8 avril 1348, à Sible Hedingham, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Sible Hedingham, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas de Praers 1287 in Sible Hedingham, Essex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Praers 33 und seine Mutter Johanna Crewe 11284. Er hat um 1334 in Essex, England, United Kingdom Mrs. Margery De Praers Of Barthomley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. April 1348 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Sible Hedingham, Essex, England und wurde in Sible Hedingham, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Praers è nato il nel 1287 nel Sible Hedingham, Essex, England, il suo padre, Richard de Praers, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Johanna Crewe, aveva 11284 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. Margery De Praers Of Barthomley circa 1334, nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 8 aprile 1348, nel Sible Hedingham, Essex, England, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Sible Hedingham, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Praersが1287年にイギリスエセックスシブル ヘディンガムで生まれた時，父Richard de Praersは33歳，母Johanna Creweは11284歳であった。約1334年にイギリスイギリスエセックスでMrs. Margery De Praers Of Barthomleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼は1348年4月8日にイギリスエセックスシブル ヘディンガムで61歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスシブル ヘディンガムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas de Praers(이)가 1287년 영국 에세스 시블일 헤딩함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Praers(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna Crewe(은)는 11284세였다. 그는 대략 1334년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 Mrs. Margery De Praers Of Barthomley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1348년 4월 8일 영국 에세스 시블일 헤딩함에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 시블일 헤딩함에 묻혔다.

mn.Barthomley, Nantwich, Cheshire, England: Barthomley, Legeceasterscir, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas de Praers nasceu em 1287, em Sible Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard de Praers, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Crewe, tinha 11284 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Margery De Praers Of Barthomley aproximadamente 1334, em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de abril de 1348, em Sible Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Sible Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas de Praers родился в 1287 г. в местности сибл хедингхам, эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Praers было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Johanna Crewe, 11284. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Margery De Praers Of Barthomley около 1334 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Он умер 8 апреля 1348 г. в местности сибл хедингхам, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности сибл хедингхам, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas de Praers nació en 1287, en Sible Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard de Praers, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Johanna Crewe, tenía 11284 años. Se casó con Mrs. Margery De Praers Of Barthomley aproximadamente 1334, en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de abril de 1348, en Sible Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Sible Hedingham, Essex, Inglaterra.
